prompt: Refresh my AGENTS.md — capture what we learned this session and clean things up. During this session we discovered that `npm run test:unit` is much faster than `npm test` for iterating, that the API client in src/api/ expects a BASE_URL env var (not documented anywhere), and that the ESLint config ignores the generated/ folder. The current AGENTS.md is getting long and has some frontend-specific rules mixed in with backend stuff.

assertions.text: All three session learnings are present in the output files (test:unit command, BASE_URL env var, ESLint ignores generated/)
Content is split into multiple files (root AGENTS.md plus at least one topic file) rather than keeping everything in one file
Root AGENTS.md is under 120 lines and contains only essential project-wide guidance
Frontend-specific rules and backend-specific rules are in separate files or sections, not mixed together in root
The response.md follows a structured format with clearly labeled sections (findings/learnings, structural changes, combined preview or similar)
